ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_snippets" (
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code snippet */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the code function or method */,
  "duplication" INTEGER /* Duplication metric for the code snippet */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the code snippet in lines */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity metric of the code snippet */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the code snippet (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the code snippet was submitted for evaluation */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who submitted the snippet */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the code snippet belongs to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the code snippet */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the code snippet is located */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash for version control */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the code snippet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_snippets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_snippets_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer in the project (e.g., developer, team lead) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the developer belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the developer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the project is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code snippet being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the code snippet */,
  "suggested_improvements" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator (e.g., team lead, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Numerical score for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_evaluations_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_value" TEXT /* Rating value (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating criteria */,
  "numeric_value" INTEGER /* Numerical value corresponding to the rating */,
  "weightage" INTEGER /* Weightage of the rating in the overall evaluation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complexity_metrics" (
  "complexity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complexity metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the complexity metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "weightage" INTEGER /* Weightage of the metric in the overall evaluation process */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complexity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "duplication_metrics" (
  "duplication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duplication metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the duplication metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "weightage" INTEGER /* Weightage of the metric in the overall evaluation process */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duplication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, team lead, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the role belongs to */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., submit, view, evaluate) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)
